heading: Omitted
label: 435 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which made inapplicable provisions of law prohibiting or restricting employment of aliens to employment under the appropriations for the Foreign Agricultural Service, was from the Department of Agriculture Appropriation Act, 1974, . Section was not repeated in the Department of Agriculture Appropriation Act, 1975, and accordingly, section was omitted from the Code. For provisions covering employment of aliens generally, see Citizenship Requirement for Employees Compensated From Appropriated Funds note under , Government Organization and Employees. Similar provisions were contained in the following prior appropriations acts:Pub. L. 93–135, title V, § 50287 Stat. 489Pub. L. 93–135section 3101 of Title 5Oct. 24, 1973, , .Pub.
